   "reasoning": "I've seen audits come and go, and I've had my head on the chopping block twice. Anything that creates unnecessary complexity - like student scholarships or counseling programs without clear metrics - is a risk I'm not willing to take. Stick to what works: incentivizing teachers and mandating attendance. Transparecy's also crucial, because when audits come, I want to be able to sleep at night knowing our records are clean.",

}
